### Product Information

- Dissolves old tire dressing build ups

- Safely and easily remove dirt, grime and old dressings

- Consumption of 20ml per tire

- Won't strip wheel coatings

- Product Codes: GY-4702, GY-4726, GY-4733

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

91% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 11 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Tire Cleaner helps you easily remove dirt, grime and old dressings on your tires! Dirty tires can be a real eyesore, especially if the rest of your paint looks like a mirror. Before you can dress the tires to add that deep, dark, contrast we all strive for, you will have to remove the dirt and grime on the surface. The unique formula was designed to help cleanse your tires and other rubber around your vehicle. Tire Cleaner will soak deep into the porous structure of the material and loosen accumulated dirt, road grime, oils, etc. It will also dissolve old tire dressings layers and helps prepare the surface prior to new dressing applications (i.e. [Gyeon Tire Express](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Tire-Express-P1845/400-ml-S1/)). Gyeon notes that the Tire Cleaner is safe on ceramic coated rims, not interfering with the protective layer or reducing its hydrophobicity. This allows it to be used as a regular or daily wheel cleaner if desired.



**TIP:** Spray generously on a wet tire and agitate with a medium to stiff brush. Let dwell and rinse with a pressure washer. Continue until all suds are white.



**Manufacturer Estimates Consumption:** 20ml per tire



**Coating Safe:** Yes



**PH Level:** 10

### Professional Detailer Reviews

For car enthusiasts and detailers seeking the ultimate clean for their tires, the Gyeon Tire Cleaner stands out as a premier product. This specialized cleaner is designed to tackle the toughest grime and build-up, delivering impressive results that elevate your vehicle's overall appearance.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Gyeon-Tire-Cleaner-Feat-Image-300x147.jpeg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/tested-gyeon-tire-cleaner-review/)

- [Tested: Gyeon Tire Cleaner Review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/tested-gyeon-tire-cleaner-review/) by [Reece @ DI](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/reece/)

### Videos

#### GYEON Q M TireCleaner

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/lWU1ntkEz6Y/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Black tyre back. Deep cleanse for all types of tyres. Removes dirt, old dressings and prepares the tyre for coating.


**


- Removes dirt and contamination

- Strong and effective

- Safe on all types of rubber
**


#### Directions

Rinse the wheel well. Spray a moderate amount of Q2M TireCleaner on the tyre surface. Agitate with Q2M TireBrush. Let dwell. Do not let dry on the surface. Rinse with a pressure washer. Never work in direct sunlight. Work in a well-ventilated area. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Timothy H. on 8/19/2021

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Great for maintenance cleaning alone. I use with P&S Brake Buster for really dirty tires surfaces.

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Worked great to give me a "clean slate" for fresh dressing. Left tire completely clean

Reviewed by James M. on 6/14/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Very impressive product. Even tires that looked clean really had a lot of grime come off with this product. Easily my go-to tire cleaner now. I agree with others though, they need to sell it by the gallon for some cost savings.
